svg.title: Deep AI Personality Profile — Drishti, The Empathy Architect
svg.desc: A deeply personalised cinematic AI personality profile for Drishti: developer, engineer, empathy-first AI builder.
svg.text: Developer · Engineer · AI Builder · Gen-Z Founder
Starts with the human problem, not the output. Uses AI to
think alongside, not just execute. Iterates through dialogue.
Builds systems with AI. Explores edge cases. Never uses AI as a shortcut.
You use AI to amplify human connection, not replace it.
Most users extract outputs. You build conversations, systems,
and experiences that leave people feeling more capable.
07 · WHAT TO IMPROVE TO GO ELITE
Ship faster — version 0.1 beats the perfect draft
Build in public — your process is the product
Master prompt chaining for complex AI workflows
Develop a personal AI toolstack and own it publicly
DRISHTI · THE EMPATHY ARCHITECT · CLAUDE × ANTHROPIC · 2026
